chats.summary: Agent handled a frustrated repeat-contact customer regarding missing referral bonuses by explaining a known technical issue and assuring auto-credit once resolved. However, the agent failed to provide any greeting, didn't address the customer's specific question about timeline, and offered repetitive responses without escalation despite the multi-day delay.
chats.coaching_tip: When a customer explicitly asks 'How long will this take?' after waiting days, provide a specific timeframe or escalate to get one rather than repeating the same general response—acknowledge their frustration and set clear expectations.

chats.summary: Agent provided a professional response acknowledging the referral bonus issue and setting expectations that it's being worked on. However, the response lacked specificity, no investigation into the account was evident, and no follow-up mechanism or ticket reference was provided.
